headlines.title: Thai police arrest Australian over killing of teenager found in suitcase
headlines.snippet: Thai police have arrested an Australian man at Bangkok's main airport as he was allegedly attempting to fly home. He is suspected of killing a teenager whose body was found stuffed inside a suitcase.

headlines.title: Germany braces for record-breaking temperatures as heatwave moves east
headlines.snippet: Germany is preparing for extremely high temperatures as a heatwave moves eastward. Several European countries, including the UK and Switzerland, have already experienced record June temperatures, with some fatalities reported in France.

headlines.title: Somali intelligence helps US arrest alleged leader of Minnesota fraud
headlines.snippet: Somali intelligence played a role in the US arrest of an alleged leader of a fraud operation based in Minnesota. US prosecutors sought the suspect in Somalia to bring him to justice for crimes committed in the United States.

headlines.title: Iran war day 120: Tehran condemns US strikes, says it violates MoU
headlines.snippet: Iran's foreign ministry condemned US strikes, stating they violate a Memorandum of Understanding. The US reported targeting Iranian missile and drone storage sites, while Iran claimed to have hit US military locations.

headlines.title: Who profits from Africa’s gold?
headlines.snippet: African governments are striving for increased control over their gold resources. However, a significant portion of the value generated from gold continues to be exported out of the continent.

headlines.title: Lebanon’s state-owned NNA reports Israeli bombing near border
headlines.snippet: Lebanon's state-owned National News Agency reported Israeli bombing near the border town of Markaba, approximately 1.5km from the Israel-Lebanon border. This follows a framework agreement between Lebanon and Israel, which was criticized by a Hezbollah lawmaker who warned it could lead to civil war.

headlines.title: Video: Netanyahu says Israel will remain in southern Lebanon until Hezbollah ‘disarm’
headlines.snippet: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel will maintain its presence in southern Lebanon until Hezbollah disarms. He described a recently announced framework agreement between Lebanon and Israel as a major setback for Iran.

headlines.title: Morning update
headlines.snippet: A fragile US-Iran ceasefire is under strain following US strikes on Iranian targets after an alleged drone attack on a commercial vessel. Iran reportedly retaliated by targeting US positions, while a US-brokered Israel-Lebanon agreement marks a diplomatic development.

headlines.title: Pakistan reaffirms support for regional peace in call with Iran
headlines.snippet: Pakistan's foreign minister reaffirmed the country's commitment to regional peace during a call with Iran's foreign minister. Iran's minister thanked Pakistan for its support in advancing the peace process and facilitating the return of Iranian crew members.

headlines.title: Israel to reduce forces in southern Lebanon, army radio says
headlines.snippet: The Israeli military is reportedly reducing its forces in southern Lebanon, withdrawing some combat brigades and increasing readiness levels. This comes after Lebanon and Israel agreed to a framework deal with the United States.

headlines.title: Seoul says Chinese, Russian military aircraft enter its air defense zone
headlines.snippet: Seoul reported that Chinese and Russian military aircraft entered its air defense identification zone. The report originated from Al Arabiya English.

headlines.title: Trump unveils new US passport – with picture of himself
headlines.snippet: Trump has unveiled a new US passport design that features a picture of himself. This news was reported by Al Arabiya English.

headlines.title: Russian drone strikes kill two in Ukraine’s Dnipropetrovsk region, one in Sumy region
headlines.snippet: Russian drone strikes have resulted in two fatalities in Ukraine's Dnipropetrovsk region and one in the Sumy region. The report was from Al Arabiya English.

headlines.title: US strikes Iran in response to attack on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.snippet: The US has conducted strikes against Iran in response to an attack on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz. This information was provided by Al Arabiya English.

headlines.title: Policemen Rescue Toddler From Destroyed Building in La Guaira
headlines.snippet: Policemen in La Guaira rescued a toddler from a destroyed building. The report was from Al Arabiya English.

headlines.title: US strikes Iran sites after cargo ship attack, Tehran retaliates
headlines.snippet: US strikes on Iranian military sites, following an attack on a cargo ship, have raised concerns about security in the Strait of Hormuz and the stability of the ceasefire.

headlines.title: France’s terrorism apology law faces test in pro-Palestine case
headlines.snippet: A Paris court has halted the trial of Kazib, raising a constitutional question about civil party powers in a case concerning France's terrorism apology law. Campaigners view this as a victory for the Palestine movement.

headlines.title: Ms Rachel says world has failed Palestinian children at briefing
headlines.snippet: During a press briefing, Ms Rachel expressed emotional distress regarding the situation of Palestinian children. She apologized to a young girl and urged world leaders to take action.

headlines.title: Shia Muslims mark their holiest day in war-battered Lebanon
headlines.snippet: Shia Muslims observed their holiest day, Ashura, with marches through the ruins of Nabatieh. Mourners gathered to commemorate the event amidst destruction resulting from Israel's conflict in south Lebanon.

headlines.title: Hezbollah rejects Lebanon-Israel deal, warns of civil war
headlines.snippet: Hezbollah has rejected the framework agreement between Lebanon and Israel, warning that its implementation could lead to civil war. Meanwhile, Netanyahu indicated that Israeli troops would remain in Lebanon.

headlines.title: إيران: وزارة الخارجية: طهران تؤكد أنها ستدافع عن سيادة البلاد وأمنها ومصالحها الوطنية بكل ما أوتيت من قوة
headlines.snippet: Iran's Ministry of Foreign Affairs affirmed that Tehran will defend the country's sovereignty, security, and national interests with all its might. The source is almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: تصريحات روته تفتح ملف الدور الأوروبي في الحرب على إيران
headlines.snippet: Rutte's statements have brought attention to the European role in the conflict involving Iran. The source of this information is almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: حزب الكرامة المصري يحيي ذكرى المناضلين منير الصياد وكمال حديد
headlines.snippet: The Egyptian Karama Party commemorated the martyrs Monir Al-Sayyad and Kamal Hadid. This news is from almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: حشود عاشورائية في الضاحية الجنوبية تؤكد التمسك بنهج المقاومة
headlines.snippet: Large Ashura gatherings in the southern suburbs affirmed adherence to the approach of resistance. The source is almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: المسيرة العاشورائية في الضاحية الجنوبية تجدد رسائل الثبات والالتزام
headlines.snippet: The Ashura procession in the southern suburbs reiterated messages of steadfastness and commitment. This report is from almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: Jordan sends rescue teams, medical staff to Venezuela following devastating earthquakes
headlines.snippet: Jordan has dispatched rescue teams and medical staff to Venezuela in response to devastating earthquakes. This news comes from the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: Army thwarts drug smuggling attempt using guided balloons
headlines.snippet: The army successfully thwarted an attempt to smuggle drugs using guided balloons. The report is from the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: Attack on ship in Hormuz leads UN to halt evacuation plan for trapped sailors
headlines.snippet: An attack on a ship in the Strait of Hormuz has prompted the UN to halt its evacuation plan for stranded sailors. This information is from the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: Lebanon president welcomes French, Italian efforts to form coalition to succeed UNIFIL
headlines.snippet: Lebanon's president has welcomed French and Italian efforts to establish a coalition to succeed UNIFIL. The report is from the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: Switzerland, Canada advance as Brazil eye last 32
headlines.snippet: Switzerland and Canada have advanced in a competition, while Brazil is aiming for the last 32. This news is from the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: UN says Iran nuclear pledge needs 'very strong' verification
headlines.snippet: The UN stated that Iran's nuclear pledge requires very strong verification. This report is from L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: A Damascus delusion: The myth of a Syrian solution for Lebanon
headlines.snippet: A commentary suggests that the idea of a Syrian solution for Lebanon is a delusion. The source is L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: Israeli and Lebanese officials deny any partial Israeli withdrawal from 'buffer zone'
headlines.snippet: Israeli and Lebanese officials have denied any partial Israeli withdrawal from a 'buffer zone'. This information comes from L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: Rubio on tour says any Iran deal will ensure security of Gulf allies
headlines.snippet: Rubio stated during a tour that any deal with Iran will ensure the security of Gulf allies. The source is L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: Families of 4 missing post-cease-fire protest outside Grand Serail
headlines.snippet: Families of four individuals missing since the ceasefire have protested outside the Grand Serail. This news is from L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: Industry Minister announces unused land will be withdrawn and offered again to serious investors
headlines.snippet: The Minister of Industry announced a government campaign to reclaim unused industrial land. This land will be offered to serious investors with ready business plans, starting next week.

headlines.title: Actor Ahmed al-Saadany marries Mirna al-Helbawy in surprise announcement
headlines.snippet: Actor Ahmed al-Saadany has surprised social media users by announcing his marriage to writer Mirna al-Helbawy. The announcement included a photo on Instagram.

headlines.title: Authorities investigate shooting of monk’s car in Fayoum
headlines.snippet: Authorities are investigating a video showing individuals firing at a monastery in Fayoum Governorate, reportedly injuring a monk. The Ministry of Interior stated the incident was reported on June 26.

headlines.title: Five people die from collapsing shaft during illegal artifact excavation in Egypt
headlines.snippet: Five individuals died in Egypt when a shaft collapsed during an illegal excavation for antiquities in a mountainous area. The Assiut Security Director received a report about the incident.

headlines.title: White House asks OpenAI to limit its next model release
headlines.snippet: The White House has requested that OpenAI limit the release of its upcoming GPT 5.6 model due to its advanced capabilities. The request is for the model to be accessible only to government-approved partners.

headlines.title: «يديعوت أحرونوت»: الساعات الأخيرة قبل وقف النار... كمين حزب الله أربك «الكتيبة 52» - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: Yedioth Ahronoth reported that Hezbollah's ambush during the final hours before the ceasefire disrupted 'Battalion 52'. The source is Al Akhbar.

headlines.title: لبنان يوقع اتفاق العار... نتنياهو: إنجاز كبير لإسرائيل! - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: Al Akhbar reported on Lebanon signing 'the agreement of shame,' with Netanyahu calling it a great achievement for Israel.

headlines.title: أعضاء في اتحاد الكتّاب اللبنانيين: زيارة رئيس الاتحاد إلى القصر الجمهوري تمت بقرار منفرد - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: Members of the Lebanese Writers Union stated that the visit of their union's president to the presidential palace was a unilateral decision. The source is Al Akhbar.

headlines.title: قاسم يعلن الدخول في «مرحلة جديدة»: على إسرائيل أن تخرج «ذليلة» وهذا ما سيحصل - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: Qassem announced the start of a 'new phase,' stating Israel must withdraw 'humbled.' The source is Al Akhbar.

headlines.title: على وقع المفاوضات في واشنطن... العدوان الإسرائيلي يتواصل على جنوب لبنان - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: Al Akhbar reported continued Israeli aggression on southern Lebanon coinciding with negotiations in Washington.

headlines.title: تقرير مصور | الهريسة العاشورائية… تقليدٌ متجذّر في الجنوب يجسّد روح العطاء والوفاء للإمام الحسين (ع)
headlines.snippet: A photo report details the Ashura harissa as a deep-rooted tradition in the South, symbolizing giving and loyalty to Imam Hussein. The tradition has been maintained in the town of Sakaka for over forty years.

headlines.title: اعتقال عشرات المحتجين عقب تظاهرة مناهضة لسياسات الرئيس الإندونيسي في سورابايا
headlines.snippet: Police in Indonesia arrested dozens of protesters following a march against President Prabowo Subianto's policies in Surabaya. The demonstration was against rising fuel prices and called for an end to a free meal program.

headlines.title: ترامب يهدد برسوم 100% على الدول التي تفرض ضرائب رقمية على الشركات الأميركية
headlines.snippet: President Donald Trump threatened 100% tariffs on goods from countries imposing digital taxes on American companies. He mentioned that several European countries are considering implementing digital services taxes.

headlines.title: لجنة كفرحزير دعت شورى الدولة إلى وقف تنفيذ قرارات إعادة عمل مقالع الترابة
headlines.snippet: The Kfarhazir Environmental Committee urged the State Council to halt the implementation of decisions allowing cement quarries to resume operations. They also called for the cancellation of monopoly fees on imported cement.

headlines.title: قوات العدو تفرج عن الأشخاص المحتجزين لديها منذ يوم أمس عند أطراف بلدة عين عرب
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces released six individuals detained near the town of Ain Arab. They were held for several hours after being stopped while working in agricultural lands in the area.

headlines.title: Israeli forces detain Palestinian during raid near Balata refugee camp, teen injured - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces detained a Palestinian during a raid near the Balata refugee camp, and a teenager was injured. This report is from WAFA Agency.

headlines.title: Israeli colonists graze their sheep on Palestinian residents' lands near Ramallah - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: Israeli colonists were seen grazing their sheep on Palestinian residents' lands near Ramallah. This information comes from WAFA Agency.

headlines.title: Palestinian man injured as Israeli forces raid wedding celebration near Jerusalem - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: A Palestinian man was injured when Israeli forces raided a wedding celebration near Jerusalem. This report is from WAFA Agency.

headlines.title: Israeli forces close entrances to several towns and villages northwest of Ramallah - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces closed the entrances to several towns and villages northwest of Ramallah. This information is from WAFA Agency.

headlines.title: Israeli strike kills three civilians, injures others in central Strip - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: An Israeli strike killed three civilians and injured others in the central Gaza Strip. This report is from WAFA Agency.

headlines.title: صيدلية طبيعية بمظهر شائك.. خبراء تغذية يكشفون الفوائد المذهلة لـ "الخرشوف"
headlines.snippet: Experts in nutrition have revealed the amazing benefits of artichokes, describing them as a natural pharmacy with a thorny appearance. The source is paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: أمين عام حزب الله: لا خيار أمام الاحتلال سوى الانسحاب الكامل من أرضنا
headlines.snippet: The Secretary-General of Hezbollah stated that the occupation has no choice but to completely withdraw from their land. This information is from paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: مقر خاتم الأنبياء للدفاع الجوي: تحركات الطيران الإسرائيلي في أجواء دول الجوار تهديد لإيران
headlines.snippet: Khatam al-Anbiya Air Defense Base considers Israeli aircraft movements in neighboring countries' airspace a threat to Iran. The source is paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: "أمتلك جناحاً كاملاً في رأسه".. أوباما يسخر من "هوس" ترامب والبيت الأبيض يرد بقوة
headlines.snippet: Obama reportedly mocked Trump's 'obsession,' and the White House responded strongly. This news is from paltoday.ps.

headlines.snippet: The occupation forces arrested a citizen from Yatta and raided homes, tampering with their contents in the Hebron Governorate. This report is from paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: Pakistan says Hajj 2027 registrations top 100,000 in first five days of sign-ups
headlines.snippet: Pakistan has registered over 100,000 registrations for Hajj 2027 within the first five days of sign-ups. This news is from Arab News.

headlines.title: US, Iran exchange fresh strikes, raising fears over fragile Hormuz ceasefire
headlines.snippet: Fresh strikes exchanged between the US and Iran have heightened concerns over the fragile ceasefire in the Strait of Hormuz. This report is from Arab News.

headlines.title: Burkina Faso cuts diplomatic ties with ex-ruler France
headlines.snippet: Burkina Faso has severed diplomatic ties with France. This information comes from Arab News.

headlines.title: Iranian sailors seized by US handed over in Pakistan
headlines.snippet: Iranian sailors, who were seized by the US, have been handed over in Pakistan. This news is from Arab News.

headlines.title: UAE foreign minister tells Iran shipping must pass freely through Hormuz
headlines.snippet: The UAE foreign minister stated that shipping must be allowed to pass freely through the Strait of Hormuz. This report is from Arab News.

headlines.snippet: There was a poor response to a call for mass protests in Gaza concerning living conditions. This information is from The National.

headlines.title: John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling sensitive documents
headlines.snippet: John Bolton has pleaded guilty to mishandling sensitive documents. This report is from The National.

headlines.snippet: ISIS attacks against Syrian forces are reportedly increasing sharply, according to a conflict monitor. This news is from The National.

headlines.snippet: Fire crews responded to a blaze at a carpet market in Abu Dhabi's Mina Zayed. This report is from The National.

headlines.title: Buckingham Palace's reign as home of UK monarch ends after nearly 200 years
headlines.snippet: Buckingham Palace's nearly 200-year tenure as the home of the UK monarch has concluded. This information is from The National.

headlines.snippet: Veteran Tamil filmmaker K Bhagyaraj has passed away after a heart attack. This report is from Gulf News.

headlines.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll jumps to 589 as 50,000 remain missing
headlines.snippet: The death toll from the earthquake in Venezuela has risen to 589, with 50,000 people still missing. This information comes from Gulf News.

headlines.title: Trump threatens 100 per cent tariff on EU countries over digital services tax
headlines.snippet: Trump has threatened a 100% tariff on EU countries over their digital services tax. This report is from Gulf News.

headlines.snippet: The UAE's National Crisis and Emergency Management Authority (NCEMA) attributed false emergency alerts to a technical malfunction. This information is from Gulf News.

headlines.title: Brad Pitt wins key court ruling in Château Miraval dispute with Angelina Jolie
headlines.snippet: Brad Pitt has won a key court ruling in his dispute with Angelina Jolie over Château Miraval. This report is from Gulf News.

headlines.title: Qatar study highlights AI’s great potential for diagnostic precision in women’s health
headlines.snippet: A study conducted in Qatar highlights the significant potential of AI in improving diagnostic precision in women's health. This information is from Gulf Times.

headlines.title: Private sector engagement strengthens academic links, says educator
headlines.snippet: An educator stated that engagement with the private sector strengthens academic links. This report is from Gulf Times.

headlines.snippet: The Minister of Interior held a meeting with the US Acting Attorney General. This information is from Gulf Times.

headlines.snippet: Qatar has established an assistance air bridge to Venezuela to aid earthquake relief efforts, following directives from HH the Amir. This report is from Gulf Times.

headlines.snippet: Japan is evacuating thousands and has canceled over 100 flights as two tropical storms approach. This information comes from Gulf Times.

headlines.snippet: The Japanese and Indian governments plan to promote vehicles that operate on biogas. This report is from Times of Oman.

headlines.snippet: Sayyid Badr held a telephone conversation with his Egyptian counterpart. This information is from Times of Oman.

headlines.snippet: Skipper Iyer commented that "You can't take anything for granted" after India's loss to Ireland in the 1st T20I. This report is from Times of Oman.

headlines.snippet: Trump stated regarding Iran's attack on a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz, "They shouldn't be doing that." This information is from Times of Oman.

headlines.title: India's strong refining capacity reduced impact of energy shocks on India, helped save cost: EY
headlines.snippet: India's robust refining capacity helped mitigate the impact of energy shocks and save costs. This report is from Times of Oman.

headlines.title: Iran claims to strike US-linked targets, warns Gulf states not to aid attacks
headlines.snippet: Iran's Foreign Ministry stated that US attacks on Iran and alleged attacks on Lebanon, coordinated with the US, violate the ceasefire agreement.

headlines.title: Civil Commission Chair presents Oct. 7 sexual violence report to UN, calls for recognition
headlines.snippet: The Civil Commission Chair presented the October 7 sexual violence report to the UN, calling for its recognition. The report, 'Silenced No More,' was compiled with international experts in law and human rights.

headlines.title: In the pink: Jerusalem's Botanical Gardens unfurls an array of lotus flowers
headlines.snippet: Jerusalem's Botanical Gardens are showcasing an array of lotus flowers during the summer season. The flowers are noted for their vibrant display on the pond's surface.

headlines.title: Int'l dance company arrives in Israel, proving Hora can be a state of mind
headlines.snippet: Igal Perry and New York's Peridance Contemporary Dance Company have arrived in Israel with a program featuring diverse dance styles, including a personal interpretation of the hora.

headlines.title: The shoreline that holds: October 7 post-trauma therapists embark on a healing retreat
headlines.snippet: Therapists who worked with survivors of the October 7 events are participating in a healing retreat. They have supported survivors, bereaved families, and children dealing with trauma.

headlines.title: ‘Operation Thunderbolt’: 50 years to the heroic raid on Entebbe
headlines.snippet: A discussion marked the 50th anniversary of the raid on Entebbe, referencing the 1977 Israeli film based on the 1976 IDF rescue of hostages. This post is from The Times of Israel.

headlines.title: Transportation Ministry says it reached deal to clear US jets clogging up Tel Aviv airport
headlines.snippet: An agreement has been reached to clear US jets from Tel Aviv airport, reportedly after the minister asked Netanyahu to intervene. The jets are to be moved to Air Force bases by Tuesday. This post is from The Times of Israel.

headlines.title: Texas creates required reading list that includes Anne Frank and the Bible
headlines.snippet: The Texas state board of education has approved a required reading list that includes Anne Frank and the Bible. This decision faced objections from Jewish leaders concerned about Christian content in lessons. This post is from The Times of Israel.

headlines.title: New Treblinka research uncovers forgotten role of women in 1943 death camp revolt
headlines.snippet: New research on Treblinka uncovers the previously overlooked role of women in the 1943 death camp revolt. A new book by historian Chad S.A. Gibbs aims to restore their place in camp resistance. This post is from The Times of Israel.

headlines.title: Nearly three-quaters of Israelis fear a repeat of Oct. 7-style attack, poll finds
headlines.snippet: A poll indicates that nearly three-quarters of Israelis fear a repeat of an October 7-style attack. A majority also desire a state commission of inquiry into the security failures, which Netanyahu opposes. This post is from The Times of Israel.

headlines.title: Hezbollah slams Israel-Lebanon agreement as 'gift to enemy,' warns of civil war
headlines.snippet: Hezbollah has condemned the Israel-Lebanon agreement as a 'gift to the enemy' and warned of civil war. This information comes from Haaretz.

headlines.title: With IDF Drones Circling Overhead, Lebanon's Shi'ites Celebrate the Ashura Holiday
headlines.snippet: Lebanon's Shi'ites are celebrating the Ashura holiday amidst the presence of IDF drones overhead. This report is from Haaretz.

headlines.title: 'Do They Expect Us to Wave the LGBT Flag?': Arab World Erupts Over Egypt–Iran 'Pride Match' in Seattle
headlines.snippet: The Arab world reacted strongly to an Egypt-Iran 'Pride Match' in Seattle, with questions raised about the appropriateness of the event. This news is from Haaretz.

headlines.title: Opinion • The U.S. and Israel, both backsliding democracies, may already be beyond repair
headlines.snippet: An opinion piece suggests that the US and Israel, both democracies experiencing backsliding, may be beyond repair. This report is from Haaretz.

headlines.title: Settlers Tried to Torch Palestinian Homes. They Messed With the Wrong Village
headlines.snippet: Settlers reportedly attempted to torch Palestinian homes but were prevented by the residents of a village. This news is from Haaretz.

headlines.title: Iranian Armed Forces ready to strengthen national security, justice: Khatam al-Anbiya HQ cmdr.
headlines.snippet: Major General Ali Abdollahi, Commander of Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, affirmed the Armed Forces' readiness to bolster national security and justice.

headlines.title: ‘Failed US president’ has shown he’s not committed to principles of negotiation: Iranian MP
headlines.snippet: The chairperson of the Iranian Parliament's National Security and Foreign Policy Commission stated that the US president has demonstrated a lack of commitment to negotiation principles.

headlines.title: Iran, UAE discuss latest regional developments
headlines.snippet: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and his Emirati counterpart discussed regional developments over the phone.

headlines.title: IRGC Navy strikes US military positions after American aggression
headlines.snippet: The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Navy claims to have targeted US military positions in retaliation for an American act of aggression.

headlines.title: Iran, Egypt foreign ministers discuss regional developments over phone
headlines.snippet: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi held a telephone conversation with his Egyptian counterpart, Badr Abdelatty, discussing regional issues.

headlines.title: Death toll from Venezuela quake exceeds 900
headlines.snippet: The death toll from the earthquake in Venezuela has surpassed 900. This information is from Mehr News Agency.

headlines.title: Israeli forces kidnap 6 farmers in southern Lebanon
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces have reportedly kidnapped six farmers in southern Lebanon. This news is from Mehr News Agency.

headlines.title: Security not for sale, defence means non-negotiable
headlines.snippet: The principle of security not being for sale and defense being non-negotiable was emphasized. This report is from Mehr News Agency.

headlines.title: Gambling on US to cost Persian Gulf states security
headlines.snippet: A commentary suggests that relying on the US will cost Persian Gulf states their security. This information is from Mehr News Agency.

headlines.title: Oman says Hormuz Strait not to return to its pre-war status
headlines.snippet: Oman has stated that the Strait of Hormuz will not revert to its pre-war status. This report is from Mehr News Agency.
